data.acceptance:
1. The overview stale grooming UI no longer clips at the built-in browser default width and is opened from an integrated overview tab/dialog or equivalent first-class stale-beats cue.
2. The freeform model textbox is removed; stale grooming defaults come from a configured dispatch/pool target and the user can override to any configured supported agent/model from a select control.
3. Stale beats are ordered by age since last update descending and the UI provides clear select all and select fewer/select stale subset controls.
4. First-class API routes allow clients to list stale beats, enqueue selected targets, enqueue the five oldest stale beats, and read review/queue/worker status without using the browser UI.
5. Diagnostics expose stale grooming queue and worker/status data in the diagnostics page.
6. Tests cover stale ordering, default dispatch/model selection, API listing/batch triggering/status, and UI payload shaping where practical.
7. Lint, typecheck, default tests, build, and built-in browser review pass.
